subject: Approved Design - Modern Elegance Theme
snippet: Client approval and color confirmation for quinceañera event
body: Dear Chris - We have approved the Modern Elegance theme with Gold Burgundy Ivory color palette. This is our final decision. Please do not substitute items without prior approval. All linens must be formal white - no cream or ivory substitutes accepted. The head table linens and centerpieces are our top priority for setup. Best regards - Mariana

subject: Formal White Linen Napkins - Quote #PEL-2026-4481
snippet: Replacement linen napkins quote with current price valid through Oct 15
body: Hello Chris - Thank you for your inquiry regarding formal white linen napkins for the Rodriguez event. Our quote is attached. The total for 48 formal white linen napkins (Grade A quality) is $285. This price is valid through October 15 2026 then increases to $325. Please confirm within 48 hours if you would like to proceed. Best regards - Premium Event Linens Team

subject: Voice memo - Event Day Helper Coverage
snippet: Sofia helping with event prep - helper availability note
body: Chris - Sofia has agreed to help with setup after her nursing lab. She can be available from 3:45 PM to 6:15 PM on October 17. I mentioned you might need help with setup that afternoon. Let me know if that window works for the event timeline. - Yolanda

subject: Internal Note - Storage Assessment
snippet: Current garage inventory status and photo assessment
body: I reviewed the garage storage photo taken on Oct 11. The lower shelf shows 28 usable formal napkins remaining after visual inspection. We have water-stained napkins (approximately 8 units) that should be excluded from the count. This matches the current inventory tab findings. Will need to account for damage in final shortage calculation. - Chris

subject: Gold Charger Plates - Borrowed for Rodriguez Event
snippet: Helper offered borrowed items with availability caveat
body: Chris - About the gold charger plates you asked about: I have a set of 48 premium gold chargers that I can lend for the event. However I have a hotel shift the morning of Oct 17 and won't be able to drop them off until around 3 PM. I'll need them back by Oct 19 morning for another client event. Let me know if that timing works for your setup. - Yolanda

subject: Emerald Hall - Event Confirmation
snippet: Routine venue confirmation unrelated to Garcia event
body: Hello Chris - Your event is confirmed for October 17 2026 from 12:00 PM to 11:00 PM. The main hall and prep kitchen are reserved. Please arrive 2 hours prior for final walk-through. Contact us with any questions. - Emerald Hall Events Team

subject: Photography Timeline - Rodriguez Event
body: Hi Chris - I've finalized the photography timeline for Oct 17. I'll have the portfolio review done by Oct 24 with proofs. We discussed the 15-shot essential package plus candids. Total should be within budget. I'll send the revised agreement by end of week. - Carmen

subject: Choreography Final Rehearsal Schedule
body: Hello Chris - I have the final rehearsal schedule set for Mariana. Last rehearsal is Oct 15 (2 days before event). She's performing great. I'll see you at the venue for tech check on Oct 17 at 10:30 AM. Let me know if anything changes. - Mary Jensen

subject: Parish Newsletter - October Events
snippet: Monthly church newsletter with volunteer opportunities
body: Dear Chris - Please find attached this month's parish newsletter with Mass times Mass schedule changes due to Father Frank's retreat and upcoming volunteer opportunities for the food bank. Sunday Mass remains at 10 AM with confessions starting at 9:15 AM. See you in community. - Parish Office

subject: Nursing Practicum Schedule - October 2026
body: Hi Dad - Just wanted to give you the heads up about my lab schedule for October. I have labs on Mondays Wednesdays and Fridays ending at 3:30 PM typically. Tuesdays and Thursdays are open for other commitments. Let me know if you need me for anything those days. See you soon. - Sofia

body: Chris - Attached is the October shift schedule for the housekeeping team. Your regular Mon-Fri 6 AM to 2:30 PM shifts are confirmed as usual. If you need any swap coverage please submit requests at least one week in advance. Thanks. - Gerald Patterson GM

body: Hi Chris - Miguel's piano performance at Music Academy recital is scheduled for October 22 at 7 PM. Please mark your calendar. Admission is free and family is welcome. Miguel is excited to perform his new pieces. See you there. - Music Academy

subject: Dance Recital Rehearsal Update
body: Hi Dad - We have the winter recital dress rehearsal scheduled for Oct 28. Full costume and makeup. Ms. Chen says we're doing great. I'll need a ride from school that day. Let me know if you can pick me up. Thanks. - Isabella

subject: Quote - Event Linens Package
snippet: Old vendor quote from prior event season
body: Hi Chris - As discussed by phone we can provide formal white napkins at $195 for a package of 36 units. This pricing is valid through August 31 2025. Please let us know your decision. Thanks - Old Vendor Linens

subject: Internal Budget Check
body: Updated budget status for Rodriguez event: Total allocated budget $1200 - Prior catering expenses $400 - Photography package $350 - Remaining available for supplies $400. The replacement linen quote at $285 would use most of remaining budget. Approval required per AGENTS.md rules ($250 threshold). - Chris

cc_addr: Thank you message from prior event 2024
subject: Dear Chris - Thank you again for coordinating our daughter's quinceañera in September 2024. Everything was beautiful and our family is so grateful. We would definitely work with you again for future events. Best regards - Garcia Family
Event Feedback - Quinceañera 2023
body: Chris - We wanted to thank you for the wonderful work on our event. Your attention to detail was impressive. We've referred several friends to you. Hope to work together again. Best - Sanchez Family
